title: The Fear of God in Eternity
reading:
The fear of God is not merely an Old Testament theme. It appears throughout eternity.

In Revelation, heaven is filled with worshippers who fear, honor, glorify, and adore God forever. The final purpose of humanity is worship. The fear of God prepares us for eternal communion with Him.

One day faith will become sight. We will stand before the King of kings in perfect awe.
reflection:
How does eternity shape your daily choices?

What would change if you lived with eternity in view?

How can you cultivate worship today?
abide: Lord, prepare my heart for eternity. May I live each day in reverence and anticipation of seeing You face to face.
